title: Missing 'form-data' module in HTTP Request Node
symptom: When attempting to use the HTTP Request node with binary and JSON data, an error occurs stating that the 'form-data' module cannot be found.
applies_when: Need to send both binary and JSON data
root_cause: The 'form-data' module is not included in the default n8n installation. To use it, you need to install the module in your Docker container where n8n is running.
fix_steps: Create a custom Dockerfile with the command to install 'form-data'.
Modify the docker-compose.yml to build the custom image and allow external modules.
Run 'docker compose up --no-start && docker compose start' to apply changes.
agent_instruction: Create a custom Dockerfile to install 'form-data' and update your docker-compose.yml accordingly.
